title: rhododendron citriniflorum var. horaeum
intro: Rhododendron citriniflorum var. horaeum is a variant of the Rhododendron citriniflorum plant species, a type of flowering shrub native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is believed to possess antioxidant and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron citriniflorum var. horaeum are said to include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron citriniflorum var. horaeum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
